scope: retained sheet-1 reset/power and sheet-2 video/beeper semiconductors whose native or target-body designations and physical pin contracts are legible
promotion_rule: copy a designation only when printed beside the retained refdes or directly legible on the factory-identified target body; map nets to physical package pin numbers rather than schematic drawing order

reset_source.observation: sheet 1 identifies VD1 across +5 V and RES_RC with its cathode on +5 V, and prints VD5=КС147 on the derived -5 V clamp

target_body_sources.observation: the independent May reset-corner view exposes the populated red axial body and its 521В designation
registered July component coverage independently fixes the same red КД-2 body at approximately (12.5,216.1) mm beside C1; the designation face is obscured rather than reread
the independent May beeper view exposes the same red axial body and the grade suffix В on its opposite face
the registered July beeper view directly reads 521В on VD4 between the D58 and VT1/R48 cluster

physical_source.observation: owner imagery closes VT2 as the yellow three-lead КТ315 body marked Б/8901 and registers its three component-side lap joints

package_references.observation: КТ-27 / TO-126 outline; leads 1 emitter, 2 collector, 3 base
flat three-lead KТ-13 package; leads 1 emitter, 2 collector, 3 base
